category_sources: source_facts.description says Handshake Daemon & Full Node; official GitHub README says HSD implements the Handshake Protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is hsd; official GitHub README title uses HSD.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README lists Documentation Site, API Docs, and JSDoc at hsd-dev.org; README also documents CLI quickstart.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/handshake-org/hsd; repo not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a Handshake full node daemon and CLI tools; official README documents node, wallet, DNS server, RPC, REST API, and mining usage.
